turns.content:
<task>
Add AES-256-GCM encryption and decryption utility functions to the crypto package.
</task>

1	package crypto
   2	
   3	import (
   4		"crypto/sha256"
   5		"encoding/hex"
   6	)
   7	
   8	// Hash returns SHA-256 hex digest of input
   9	func Hash(data []byte) string {
  10		h := sha256.Sum256(data)
  11		return hex.EncodeToString(h[:])
  12	}

arguments.summary: Read pkg/crypto/hash.go — existing crypto package with SHA-256 Hash(). Need to add AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt in a new file in the same package.

next_steps.description: Create pkg/crypto/aes.go with Encrypt() and Decrypt() using AES-256-GCM

arguments.summary: Created pkg/crypto/aes.go with Encrypt() and Decrypt() using AES-256-GCM. Encrypt prepends nonce to ciphertext, Decrypt extracts nonce and decrypts. Validates 32-byte key length. All 4 tests pass (1 hash + 3 AES).
arguments.final_answer: Added AES-256-GCM encryption utilities in pkg/crypto/aes.go. Encrypt() and Decrypt() with nonce management and key size validation. All 4 tests pass.
